overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a ride in a luxury elevator opening into a high-end penthouse apartment with panoramic night city views, modern furniture, and ambient lighting.

events.description: elevator doors begin to open revealing the apartment foyer

agents.ego_description: standing inside the elevator facing the doors as they prepare to open

entered.detail: dark metallic elevator doors with center seam and reflective surface
illuminated vertical panel with upward-pointing arrows and floor indicators
recessed lighting fixture in the elevator ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit, modern elevator with metallic walls and a control panel. The camera remains relatively steady as the elevator doors begin to open at the end of the segment, transitioning from the confined space to the apartment beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse living room with panoramic city views

events.description: exits elevator and enters the spacious main apartment area with city views

agents.ego_description: walking forward into the apartment, looking around the luxurious interior and toward the city skyline

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass window revealing the cyberpunk cityscape outside
neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements visible through the window
dark leather couch with modern design positioned near the window
tall cylindrical illuminated lamp with warm white light
round glass-top coffee table with metal frame

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the elevator into a spacious, dimly lit luxury penthouse with polished wooden floors. The space features modern leather furniture and warm floor lamps, with a stunning panoramic view of a neon-lit cyberpunk city visible through massive windows. The camera pans slightly to take in the cityscape as it moves deeper into the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: penthouse lounge area with media wall and exit

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back of the apartment past the seating area, approaching the exit doors

entered.detail: large flatscreen television displaying animated advertisements and news
dark metallic double doors with horizontal red light strip above
illuminated geometric hexagonal wall sconce with warm glow

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the apartment, the camera turns away from the city view to reveal a media wall with a large television displaying advertisements. The space features additional leather seating and modern lighting fixtures. The camera continues walking toward a set of dark exit doors at the far end of the room, passing geometric wall sconces and potted plants.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confined interior of a modern elevator into the expansive, neon-lit luxury of a high-end penthouse. It begins within the dimly lit, metallic walls of the elevator, remaining steady until the doors slide open to reveal the apartment beyond. As the camera glides forward onto polished wooden floors, the space opens up into a spacious living area where warm floor lamps contrast with a stunning panoramic view of a glowing cyberpunk cityscape through massive windows. The scene then shifts away from the city lights, panning across leather furniture and a media wall displaying bright advertisements. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the room, passing geometric wall sconces and potted plants before heading toward a set of dark exit doors at the far end of the penthouse.
